title: Salesforce Opportunity
description: Represents an opportunity, which is a sale or pending deal. Opportunities are one of the core objects in Salesforce Sales Cloud for tracking the sales pipeline, revenue forecasting, and deal management.

IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the record has been moved to the Recycle Bin

AccountId.description: ID of the account associated with this opportunity

StageName.description: Current stage of this opportunity in the sales process

Probability.description: Percentage of estimated confidence in closing the opportunity

ExpectedRevenue.description: Calculated revenue based on the Amount field multiplied by the Probability

TotalOpportunityQuantity.description: Number of items included in this opportunity

CloseDate.description: Date when the opportunity is expected to close

NextStep.description: Description of the next step in the sales process

IsClosed.description: Indicates whether the opportunity is closed

IsWon.description: Indicates whether the opportunity is won

ForecastCategory.description: Forecast category determined by the Stage

CampaignId.description: ID of the campaign that generated this opportunity

HasOpportunityLineItem.description: Indicates whether the opportunity has associated opportunity products

Pricebook2Id.description: ID of the price book associated with this opportunity

OwnerId.description: ID of the user who owns this opportunity

ContactId.description: ID of the primary contact for this opportunity

CreatedDate.description: Date and time when this record was created

CreatedById.description: ID of the user who created this record

LastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when this record was last modified

LastModifiedById.description: ID of the user who last modified this record

FiscalQuarter.description: The fiscal quarter for the close date

FiscalYear.description: The fiscal year for the close date

Fiscal.description: The fiscal period for the close date

LastStageChangeDate.description: Date when the opportunity stage was last changed

HasOpenActivity.description: Indicates whether there is an open activity for the opportunity

HasOverdueTask.description: Indicates whether there is an overdue task for the opportunity
